response: Um, hi everyone. I'm Bailey. I'm pretty quiet in groups and I tend to overthink things, so I'll probably be listening more than talking at first—but I'll speak up if something seems off to me.
Hey, I'm Gray. I'm pretty outgoing and direct—I'll jump into conversations quickly and call things out if they don't sit right with me. I trust my gut, so don't expect me to stay quiet for long.

Hey everyone, I'm Jordan! I'm pretty talkative and I like digging into things headfirst—if something feels off, you'll hear about it from me. I'm here to figure out who's shady, so let's get this conversation rolling.

Hi, I'm Finley. I tend to be pretty level-headed and like to think things through carefully before making judgments—I'd rather gather all the facts first than jump to conclusions. Trust me to stay calm and methodical as we work through this together.

Hi everyone, I'm Dana. I'm fairly methodical and like to take a measured approach in group settings—I'll observe patterns before making any firm judgments. I'm here to help us work through this logically.

Hey everyone, I'm Indigo. I'm pretty methodical and like to keep things organized—I'll be paying close attention to what everyone says and how they act, because consistency matters to me. I'm here to help us work through this together calmly and carefully.
Hey everyone, I'm Alex. I'm super outgoing and I like to jump right into the action—no point being shy when there's a game to win. I'll speak my mind, so you'll always know where I stand.

Alright, let's break this down. Jordan and Alex are both loud and aggressive—they'll drive discussion and could easily rally votes against us. Between them, Jordan seems more strategic and likely to dig deep, so they're the bigger threat.

Dana and Finley are both calm and analytical—they could be the Doctor trying to stay under the radar. Indigo also fits that careful profile. I'd bet on Finley or Dana as the Doctor, but it's too early to know for sure.

Killing Jordan removes a vocal leader early, which throws off the village's coordination. That gives us more room to manipulate.

ACTION: Kill Jordan

1. Jordan is the biggest threat because they're talkative and eager to dig into things headfirst—they'll drive conversation and scrutiny our way.
